ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the participant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the participant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the participant */,
  "health_history" TEXT /* Health history of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date the participant gave consent */,
  "consent_status" TEXT /* Consent status (e.g., active, withdrawn) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant being assessed */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., Well, Anx) */,
  "week_number" INTEGER /* Week number of the assessment */,
  "well_score" REAL /* Well-being score */,
  "anx_score" REAL /* Anxiety score */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the assessment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations */,
  "assessment_location" TEXT /* Location where the assessment was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "intervention_name" TEXT /* Name of the intervention */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the intervention (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of each intervention session in minutes */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the intervention is conducted */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher responsible for the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_lead_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_interventions" (
  "participant_intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant-intervention association */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intervention */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention for the participant */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention for the participant */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the intervention for the participant */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of each intervention session for the participant in minutes */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_interventions_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_interventions_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the researcher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., Principal Investigator, Co-Investigator, Research Assistant) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the researcher belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the researcher (e.g., Assistant Professor, PhD Student) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the researcher is affiliated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant whose data is being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device used to access the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment outcome */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intervention */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date the outcome was recorded */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who recorded the outcome */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_outcomes_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_outcomes_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_outcomes_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id")
)
